channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Scientists discover spider that mimics a parasitic fungus
item.description: Scientists have discovered a new Amazonian spider, Taczanowskia waska, that disguises itself as a parasitic fungus.

item.title: Scientists say most food chemicals remain unknown
item.description: Scientists are exploring a hidden world of thousands of food chemicals beyond those listed on nutrition labels, a largely mysterious realm.

item.title: Vaquita gets a digital lifeline as it nears extinction
item.description: Researchers created detailed 3D models of a vaquita skeleton to help preserve the world's most endangered marine mammal.

item.title: Humans may have hidden regenerative powers
item.description: Scientists have made progress in understanding regeneration in mammals, suggesting the ability to regrow body parts may not be lost.
